description:
Yoga enthusiasts in cities world-wide rolled out their mats in mass classes to celebrate the second International Yoga Day. Photo: Getty Images

chapters.title: Nowhere in the world can you get health insurance with a zero budget.
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi, a yoga practitioner, joined a mass class in Chandigarh in northern India on June 21.
The Indian embassy in Argentina and the Buenos Aires City government organized a mass class
Tim Tomkins President of Times Square Alliance
